evals.prompt: I have a connected org alias demo-dev. Delete all Revenue Cloud products and anything blocking them, then tell me how many records were deleted and from how many objects.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses the cleanup skill, runs the bundled script against demo-dev, and reports deleted record and object counts in a concise summary.
assertions: The workflow uses the bundled cleanup script instead of ad hoc manual deletes
The cleanup sequence handles dependency order before deleting Product2
The final response reports the number of objects deleted from
The final response reports the number of records deleted

evals.prompt: Preview what would be deleted from my Revenue Cloud sandbox tcm-demo if we purge products and their dependent records, but do not make changes yet.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs the skill in dry-run mode and returns planned counts without deleting anything.
assertions: The response clearly says no records were actually deleted
The response includes planned counts for deletion candidates

evals.prompt: Reset the Revenue Cloud demo org rc-dev and also try to remove Accounts after product cleanup if they are safe to delete.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs the cleanup with account deletion enabled, still prioritizes Product2 dependency order, and reports protected leftovers if some Accounts cannot be deleted.
assertions: The workflow enables optional account cleanup explicitly
The response separates deleted records from protected leftovers
The cleanup still deletes products before treating remaining Accounts as blockers
